medical_history.chief_complaint: hoarseness and breathing difficulty for 1 day
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: intermittent headache for more than 3 years, left cervical pulsating mass of 2.5 cm in diameter
medical_history.past_medical_history: No history of diabetes, hypertension, cerebral stroke, head and neck injuries or tumors, alcohol abuse, and smoking
medical_history.social_history: No history of alcohol abuse and smoking

physical_examination.general_examination: left cervical pulsating mass of 2.5 cm in diameter

radiographic_examinations.findings: Left extracranial internal carotid artery aneurysm
Left extracranial internal carotid artery aneurysm

Left extracranial internal carotid artery aneurysm and moyamoya disease (MMD). Anastomoses between the front segment of the Willis circle and the latter segment of the Willis circle in the patient with MMD.
Validity of the left STA-MCA bypass and disappearance of the left EICA aneurysm after the ligation
Validity of the left STA-MCA bypass
Hemorrhagic stroke in the right basal ganglia region
radiographic_examinations.changes_over_time: Hematoma disappeared 20 days after the onset of the hemorrhagic stroke

radiographic_examinations.findings: Efficacy of the bilateral STA-MCA bypass and verified the disappearance of the left ECIA aneurysm after the ligation
